name: pytest-benchmark
description: Pytest fixture for benchmarking code with statistical analysis, comparing runs across commits and generating rich performance reports.

seo.title: pytest-benchmark — Test Automation / Device Cloud
seo.meta_description: pytest-benchmark: Pytest fixture for benchmarking code with statistical analysis, comparing runs across commits and generating rich performance reports.

when_to_use: Statistical performance benchmarking in pytest suites
Compare benchmark results across git commits in CI
Track performance regressions in algorithmic code
Rich histogram and timing reports for optimization work

pros: Statistical analysis of test runs built-in
Rich HTML and JSON report output
Low friction, just add a fixture
cons: CI noise can skew results without pinning
review.verdict: The go-to Python microbenchmarking tool for catching performance regressions inside your test suite.
review.best_for: Python libraries guarding hot paths against per-commit performance regressions
review.not_for: Whole-system load testing where Locust or k6 are proper fits
